mapper.select: SELECT * FROM thamgia_duan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_da = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thamgia_duan (ma_nv, ma_da, thang, nam, vai_tro) VALUES (#{maNv}, #{maDa}, #{thang}, #{nam}, #{vaiTro})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM thamgia_duan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_da = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
